# Build & Run

## Build (single DOI)

```bash
docker build --progress=plain \
-f docker/Dockerfile.imagewithdata \
--build-arg APP_IMAGE=tunaatlas-app:local \
--build-arg DATA_IMAGE=gta-data-tmp:local \
--build-arg DATASET_FILE=global_catch_ird_level2_1950_2024_harmonized_20834708_updated.qs \
--build-arg DOI_CSV=$'DOI,Filename\n10.5281/zenodo.20834708,global_catch_ird_level2_1950_2024_harmonized.csv\n' \
-t tunaatlas-single:local .
```

## Build (multiple DOIs)

```bash
docker build --progress=plain \
-f docker/Dockerfile.imagewithdata \
--build-arg APP_IMAGE=tunaatlas-app:local \
--build-arg DATA_IMAGE=gta-data-tmp:local \
--build-arg DATASET_FILE=global_catch_ird_level2_1950_2024_harmonized_20834708_updated.qs \
--build-arg DOI_CSV=$'DOI,Filename\n10.5281/zenodo.20834708,global_catch_ird_level2_1950_2024_harmonized.csv\n10.5281/zenodo.20834708,global_effort_ird_1950_2024_public_harmonized.csv\n' \
-t tunaatlas-single:local .
```

## Run

```bash
docker run --rm -p 3838:3838 tunaatlas-single:local
```
